title: AHOP Private Pack
description: Ever-changing collection of mods used by the AHOP community. Contains a number of tech, magic, exploration and quality of life mods to suit our tastes and to align with our private server.
body:
Ever-changing collection of mods used by the AHOP community. Contains a number of tech, magic, exploration and quality of life mods to suit our tastes and to align with our private server. We tend to test out the interactions of various mods on the cutting edge of the latest Minecraft versions. At the same time, we tend to break our own worlds and start over quite often, so this pack is suited for people who have no intention to create a long-term world. Our packs generally include one or more tech mods along with magic, worldgen and structures. We play with mods that offer transportation options and always include a few quality of life functions such as minimaps, inventory management and storage. As a group, we are also fond of automation or living world mods that make the world feel more lived-in such as those that add NPCs or custom mobs. Beyond this, as this is a private pack we generally can't guarantee that it will ever stay in the same form for long. You're welcome to include it in your rotation but just keep in mind that it's chaotic and it resets often.
##### Additional Licensing: ###### One or more releases of this pack includes or included several mods external to the Modrinth Platform: >###### All MrCrayFish's series mods via https://mrcrayfish.com/ under GNU GENERAL PUBLIC LICENSE v3 >###### All Macaw's series Mods by Sketch Macaw sourced from https://github.com/sketchmacaw under MIT License. >###### Legendary Origins via https://legacy.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/legendary-origins under MIT License >###### Origins (Forge) via https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/origins-forge under MIT LIcense >###### The Lost Cities and its addon(s) via https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/the-lost-cities under MIT LIcense >###### The Flesh that Hates via https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/the-flesh-that-hates under CCPL
